chunks.heading: Purpose
chunks.text: Settings controls command templates and workspace behavior used by dashboard, worktree detail, and quick actions.

chunks.heading: Workspace command fields
chunks.text: Play Groove command, open terminal at worktree command, and run local command are stored in workspace metadata. Commands must be valid shell command templates.

chunks.heading: Consellour settings
chunks.text: Consellour settings include OpenAI API key, model, and reasoning level. These values are scoped to workspace metadata and used by chat flows.
